carolNote.title: Tuhipoka mo te whai waahi a Carol mo te Tohunga Hauora AI:
carolNote.ruleA: A. Kei roto ko Carol Tohunga Hauora AI ki te 0, 2+ ranei etahi atu tohunga ka tohua mai i to roopu.
carolNote.ruleB: B. AI Health Expert Carol e kore e whakaurua ki te 1 anake etahi atu tohunga ka tohua mai i to roopu.

team.teamFullRemoveToUseBuilder: Kua ki to roopu. Tena koa tangohia tetahi tohunga hei whakamahi i te hanga roopu AI.
team.alwaysIncluded: Kei roto i nga wa katoa
team.teamEmptyAddBelow: Kei te putua to roopu tohunga. Tāpirihia nga tohunga ki raro.
team.teamFullRemoveMember: Kua ki tonu to roopu (Max {{max}} tohunga). Tena koa tangohia tetahi mema ki te hiahia koe ki te taapiri i tetahi tohunga motuhake.

team.keepingMembers: Nga Mema o te Kapa o naianei (Kei te pupuri)
team.aileenCarolReasoning: Ko nga whakaaro a Carol mo te Tohunga Hauora AI:
team.noMatchingSpecialists: Karekau he tohunga taurite i kitea mo nga taunakitanga AI. Ka taea e koe te ngana ano, te hanga a-ringa ranei i to roopu.
team.medicalDisclaimerText: Ka whakaratohia e tenei papaaho he tohutohu hauora me te arahi engari kaore e taea te whakakapi i nga mahi hauora ngaio. Me toro atu ki nga tohunga ngaio hauora whai mana mo nga ohorere me nga awangawanga hauora nui.
team.applyingTeam: E tono ana i te Rōpū...
team.availableSpecialists: Kei te waatea nga Tohunga Hauora AI
team.clickToAddInstruction: Patohia te kaari hei taapiri atu ki to roopu ({{current}}/{{max}} kua tohua). Ka whakaatuhia e nga tohungatanga kua tohua he tohu "Kua tohua".
team.teamFullInstruction: Kua ki to roopu. Tangohia he mema ki te taapiri i tetahi tohunga motuhake.
team.allSpecialistsAdded: Ko nga tohunga katoa e waatea ana kua taapirihia ki to roopu.

dialogs.exitMessage: Kei te tino hiahia koe ki te puta i tenei korerorero?
dialogs.exitWithoutSaving: Puta atu me te kore Tiaki
dialogs.logoutMessage: I tenei wa kei te korerorero koe. Ko te takiuru ki waho ka mutu. He aha taau e hiahia ana?
dialogs.deleteMessage: Kaore e taea te whakakore i tenei mahi. Kei te tino mohio koe?
dialogs.summarizeFirst: Kei te hiahia koe ki te tiki whakarāpopototanga i mua i to putanga?
dialogs.doneAlreadyMessage: Kei konei matou i nga wa e hiahia ana koe. Kia ora, kia hari!
dialogs.doneAlreadySignature: Tatou katoa (tangata me AI) i VirtualMD.app
dialogs.deleteConfirmation: E tino hiahia ana koe ki te muku i te korero ko "{{title}}"?
dialogs.multiDeleteConfirmation: E tino hiahia ana koe ki te muku i te {{count}} (ng) whiriwhiringa korero? Kaore e taea te whakakore i tenei mahi.
dialogs.addSpecialistError: Kaore i taea te uta i o kaitohutohu.
dialogs.noAdvisersToAdd: Ko te katoa o nga Kaitohutohu Hauora AI kua tohua kei roto i tenei korerorero, kei te putua ranei to rarangi (haunga nga kaiuru o naianei).

longRecording.title: Kua Tatari te Rekoata Roa
longRecording.message: Kaore e taea e matou te tuhi neke atu i te 30 hēkona me te kore e tukuna. He aha taau e hiahia ana?

dialogs.generatingSummary: Tatari koa kia mahia e matou to whakarāpopototanga kōrero...
dialogs.finishConsultationMessage: Ma tenei ka mutu te waahi korerorero hohe. Kei te tino mohio koe?
dialogs.leaveWithoutSummarizing: Waiho me te kore e whakarapopototia
dialogs.moreInfoTitle: Ētahi atu korero e hiahiatia ana
dialogs.moreInfoMessage: He poto rawa tenei korero ki te whakaputa i tetahi whakarāpopototanga whai kiko, whakaaro rereke ranei. Tena koa haere tonu te korerorero kia 150 pea nga kupu o te korero korero.
dialogs.deleteSuccessMessage: Kua pai te whakakore i to korero.
dialogs.logoutTitle: E pouri ana matou ki te kite i a koe e haere ana
dialogs.aiHealthSpecialist: Ko to tohunga mo te hauora me te oranga AI
dialogs.summaryUnavailable: Kei te hangaia he whakarāpopototanga, kāore rānei i te wātea.

shortConv.title: Kua Mutu te Korero
shortConv.messageLine1: Kua mutu te korero. He poto rawa ki te penapena, engari ka hoki mai ano.

welcome.title: Nau mai ki VirtualMD.app
welcome.subtitle: Tīmatahia to korero hauora whaiaro
welcome.description: Whiriwhiria mai i ta maatau roopu o nga kaitohutohu hauora e kaha ana ki te AI ki te tiki i nga tirohanga oranga me te arahi.
welcome.greeting: Kia ora, {{username}}. Ka pai te kite i a koe! Kua rite to roopu VirtualMD 24/7 ki te awhina ...
welcome.aileenCarolIntro: Kia ora, Ko Aileen Carol Tohunga Hauora ahau. Me pehea taku awhina i a koe i tenei ra?
welcome.persona_welcome_message: Kia ora, kei konei ahau ki te awhina i o hiahia hauora me te oranga. Me pehea taku awhina i a koe i tenei ra?

mobileWelcome.aileenCarolIntro: Ko AI Aileen Carol ahau, to tohunga hauora tuatahi. Kei te tumanako ahau ki te mohio ki a koe. Ko ahau te rangatira o to roopu tohunga hauora VirtualMD.app AI. Kua rite matou ki te awhina 24/7...

quickActions.whatShouldIDo: I runga i nga mea katoa i korerohia e matou, me aha ahau inaianei? Tena koa homai nga taunakitanga marama, mahi.
quickActions.requestSummary: Tena koa homai he whakarāpopototanga matawhānui o ā mātou whakawhitinga kōrero i tēnei wā, tae atu ki ngā kaupapa matua i kōrerohia, ngā tūtohutanga i whakatakotoria, me ngā mahi ka whai ake.

sidebarFooter.disclaimerText: E tohe ana a VirtualMD.app mo te tika. Heoi, ka taea e tenei me tetahi ratonga-a-AI te tuku korero he. Me toro atu ki tetahi tohunga ngaio hauora tangata.

account.title: Tautuhinga Pūkete
account.description: Mai i konei ka taea e koe te whakakore i to putea VirtualMD.app. Ka tangohia e tenei mahi to korero me nga korero katoa.
account.confirmDeleteText: Ko tenei mahi e kore e taea te huri. Ka tangohia katoatia o korero korero, korero, me nga konae. Me haere tonu?

transcript.noTranscript: Karekau he tuhinga e waatea ana.

chat.logInToView: Takiuru ki te tiro i o korero, ki te timata ranei i tetahi korero hou.

imageProcessing.applyPreset: Hoatu tatūkē ki te atahanga arotahi
imageProcessing.revertFocus: Arotahi ano ki te ahua taketake

child.title: Kei te mate taku tamaiti
child.subtitle: Tohunga tiaki tamariki ina tino hiahia koe
child.initialMessage: Ko AI Aileen Carol ahau, to Kaitohutohu Hauora Mariko. E mohio ana ahau ki te awangawanga o te tamaiti mate. Korerotia mai he aha kei te haere.  Tuhipoka: He AI ahau, ehara i te tangata; kei te he taku tohutohu—whakapumauhia me tetahi tohunga ngaio hauora tangata.

sleep.title: Kaore au e moe!
sleep.subtitle: Whakahokia o po, hurihia o ra
sleep.initialMessage: Ko AI Aileen Carol ahau, to Kaitohutohu Hauora Mariko, me te tohunga mo te moe a AIs Benjamin Stein (Psychiatry) me AI Alice Chen (Neurology). Tohaina o wero moe kia taea e matou te awhina. Tuhipoka: He AI matou, ehara i te tangata; he he pea ta matou tohutohu—whakapumauhia me tetahi tohunga (tangata) ngaio hauora.

nutrition.title: Te kai mo te oranga
nutrition.subtitle: Whakanuia to kaha, to oranga, me to hauora moepuku ma te kai
nutrition.initialMessage: Ko AI Aileen Carol ahau, to Kaitohutohu Hauora Mariko, kei konei me to roopu - AI Angelica Fordham (kainga kai), Whakaora Ira AI Rachel Levy, me AI African Herbalist Amina Okufur. Kei te pehea koe i tenei ra? Tuhipoka: He AI matou, ehara i te tangata; he he pea nga tohutohu—whakapumauhia me tetahi tohunga ngaio hauora whai mana.

errors.sessionFailed: I rahua te tiimata i te waahi manuhiri

uploadFeatures.title: Tuhinga & Atahanga Tukuake Ahuatanga
uploadFeatures.description: Ko ta maatau papaahi e tuku ana i nga tuhinga kaha me nga mahi tātari whakaahua ka taea e koe:
uploadFeatures.benefit1: Tukuna nga tuhinga hauora, nga purongo taiwhanga, me nga whakaahua
uploadFeatures.benefit2: Topa atu ki runga i nga waahi motuhake mo te whakamaarama taipitopito
uploadFeatures.benefit3: Tukuna a maatau kaitohutohu hauora AI ki te arotake me te matapaki i o tuhinga
uploadFeatures.benefit4: Tangohia nga whakaahua mai i to kaamera mo te korerorero tonu
uploadFeatures.registeredOnly: Ko enei ahuatanga motuhake e waatea ana ki nga kaiwhakamahi kua rehitatia.
